subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the All-Merciful! At every moment I bring thee to mind and remember thee, and I beseech God that in servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حضرت رحمن هردم ترا بخاطر آرم و بیادت افتم و از خدا طلبم که در عبودیت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
